name: bcuninstaller
description: List installed software and batch uninstall it through BC Uninstaller from Raycast

scripts.prepublishOnly:
echo "

It seems like you are trying to publish the Raycast extension to npm.

If you did intend to publish it to npm, remove the \`prepublishOnly\` script and rerun \`npm publish\` again.
If you wanted to publish it to the Raycast Store instead, use \`npm run publish\` instead.

" && exit 1

preferences.name: bcuPath
preferences.title: BCU Path
preferences.description: Path to BCU-console.exe or the BC Uninstaller install folder

preferences.name: autoRemoveHighConfidenceJunk
preferences.title: Auto-Remove High-Confidence Leftovers
preferences.label: Enable automatic high-confidence leftover cleanup
preferences.description: When enabled, batch uninstalls ask BC Uninstaller to automatically remove high-confidence leftover registry entries and other uninstall junk.

commands.name: list-applications
commands.title: Uninstall Applications
commands.description: Browse installed software and batch uninstall queued apps

title: BCUninstaller
author: sansaxena789
